title: cordia ucayaliensis
intro: Cordia ucayaliensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the Ucayali cordia or Ucayali tree. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Cordia ucayaliensis include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema. Cordia ucayaliensis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and bark in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
